enums.name: Origin

values.name: user
values.doc: Indicates the operation is initiated by a user.

values.name: system
values.doc: Indicates the operation is initiated by a system.

values.name: user,system
values.doc: Indicates the operation is initiated by a user or system.

enums.doc: The intended executor of the operation; as in Resource Based Access Control (RBAC) and audit logs UX. Default value is "user,system"

enums.name: ActionType
enums.doc: Extensible enum. Indicates the action type. "Internal" refers to actions that are for internal only APIs.

enums.name: ArtifactSigningProvisioningState
enums.doc: The status of the current operation.

enums.name: createdByType

values.name: User
values.doc: The entity was created by a user.

values.name: Application
values.doc: The entity was created by an application.

values.name: ManagedIdentity
values.doc: The entity was created by a managed identity.

values.name: Key
values.doc: The entity was created by a key.

enums.doc: The kind of entity that created the resource.

enums.name: ResourceProvisioningState
enums.doc: The provisioning state of a resource type.

enums.name: ArtifactSigningAccountNameUnavailabilityReason
enums.doc: The reason that an artifact signing account name could not be used. The Reason element is only returned if nameAvailable is false.

values.name: PublicTrust
values.doc: Used for signing files which are distributed publicly.

values.name: PrivateTrust
values.doc: Used for signing files which are distributed internally within organization or group boundary.

values.name: PrivateTrustCIPolicy
values.doc: Used for signing CI policy files.

values.name: VbsEnclave
values.doc: Used for signing files which are run in secure vbs enclave.

values.name: PublicTrustTest
values.doc: Used for signing files for testing purpose.

models.name: OperationListResult
models.doc: A list of REST API operations supported by an Azure Resource Provider. It contains an URL link to get the next set of results.

properties.name: value
properties.doc: The Operation items on this page

valueType.name: Operation
valueType.doc: Details of a REST API operation, returned from the Resource Provider Operations API

properties.name: name
properties.doc: The name of the operation, as per Resource-Based Access Control (RBAC). Examples: "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/write", "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/capture/action"

properties.name: isDataAction
properties.doc: Whether the operation applies to data-plane. This is "true" for data-plane operations and "false" for Azure Resource Manager/control-plane operations.

properties.name: display
properties.doc: Localized display information for this particular operation.

type.name: OperationDisplay
type.doc: Localized display information for an operation.

properties.name: provider
properties.doc: The localized friendly form of the resource provider name, e.g. "Microsoft Monitoring Insights" or "Microsoft Compute".

properties.name: resource
properties.doc: The localized friendly name of the resource type related to this operation. E.g. "Virtual Machines" or "Job Schedule Collections".

properties.name: operation
properties.doc: The concise, localized friendly name for the operation; suitable for dropdowns. E.g. "Create or Update Virtual Machine", "Restart Virtual Machine".

properties.name: description
properties.doc: The short, localized friendly description of the operation; suitable for tool tips and detailed views.

properties.name: origin
properties.doc: The intended executor of the operation; as in Resource Based Access Control (RBAC) and audit logs UX. Default value is "user,system"

properties.name: actionType
properties.doc: Extensible enum. Indicates the action type. "Internal" refers to actions that are for internal only APIs.

properties.name: nextLink
properties.doc: The link to the next page of items

properties.doc: A boolean value that indicates whether the name is available for you to use. If true, the name is available. If false, the name has already been taken or is invalid and cannot be used.

properties.doc: Profile type of the certificate.

properties.name: includeStreetAddress
properties.doc: Whether to include STREET in the certificate subject name.

properties.name: includeCity
properties.doc: Whether to include L in the certificate subject name. Applicable only for private trust, private trust ci profile types

properties.name: includeState
properties.doc: Whether to include S in the certificate subject name. Applicable only for private trust, private trust ci profile types

properties.name: includeCountry
properties.doc: Whether to include C in the certificate subject name. Applicable only for private trust, private trust ci profile types

properties.name: includePostalCode
properties.doc: Whether to include PC in the certificate subject name.

properties.name: identityValidationId
properties.doc: Identity validation id used for the certificate subject name.

properties.name: provisioningState
properties.doc: Status of the current operation on certificate profile.

properties.doc: Status of the certificate profile.

properties.name: enhancedKeyUsage
properties.doc: Enhanced key usage of the certificate.

properties.name: subjectName
properties.doc: Subject name of the certificate.

properties.name: thumbprint
properties.doc: Thumbprint of the certificate.

properties.name: CreateOn
properties.doc: Certificate created date.

properties.name: ExpireOn
properties.doc: Certificate expiry date.

properties.name: status
properties.doc: Status of the certificate.

properties.name: revocation
properties.doc: Revocations history of a certificate.

properties.name: requestedAt
properties.doc: The timestamp when the revocation is requested.

properties.name: effectiveAt
properties.doc: The timestamp when the revocation is effective.

properties.name: reason
properties.doc: Reason for revocation.

properties.name: remarks
properties.doc: Remarks for the revocation.

properties.name: RevocationStatus
properties.doc: Status of the revocation.

properties.name: failureReason
properties.doc: Reason for the revocation failure.

properties.doc: Certificate profile name.
